# REGIME READ — 2026-07-07

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 3 → 3 (STAGE 3 SUSTAIN Day 5 — VIX Day 6 sub-18 lock deepens to 15.95, bullish trigger tightens to 0.95 pts closest-all-cycle; BEARISH BREADTH TRIGGER CLEARED both legs on Jul 6 close).** Jul 6 read framed Stage 3 as "Day 4 sustain, VIX bounced +0.35 to 16.33 stalling Jul 3 crush momentum, gap to Stage-2 trigger widened back to 1.33 pts from record-tight 0.98 pts, bearish breadth trigger both legs unresolved into Jul 6 close, one-sigma adverse path INSIDE 200DMA floor by $3.24." **Jul 6 equity close + Jul 7 vol snapshot now available: Nasdaq Comp recovers from -5.0% to -3.9% vs 52W high (+1.12% day) = breadth trigger CLEARED first leg; NDX bounces from -4.7% to -3.5% (+1.26% day) = TQQQ estimated ~+3.78% cumulative Jul 3-Jul 6 sessions back to ~$76.33 = essentially reclaims 50DMA $76.39** (still needs broker confirm). **VIX crushes further to 15.95 (-2.44% day Jul 7)** = new cycle low, gap to Stage-2 trigger narrows to record-tight 0.95 pts, Day 6 sub-18 lock. **VXN drops materially -4.18% to 26.81** = sub-27 first close, gap to Stage-2 trigger narrows meaningfully from 2.98 pts to 1.81 pts. **VIX/VXN spread narrows further to 10.86 pts** (from 11.65 Jul 6 → 10.86 Jul 7 = second consecutive narrowing session) confirming Nasdaq-concentration premium mean-reversion signal. Gold at $4,161.10 (+0.14% flat) = defensive bid neutral not accelerating. DXY 100.93 (+0.08% Jul 7) = essentially flat. Brent 72.75 (+1.06%) = modest firm-up.
- **Total score: +1 → +4 (+3 point upgrade).** Composition improves decisively: dealer/sentiment upgrades to +2 (VIX 15.95 Day 6 sub-18 record-close-to-Stage-2 trigger + VXN sub-27 breaks the concentration-premium regime), breadth upgrades to 0 (Nasdaq Comp buffer restored, NDX recovery, DJI holds essentially at 52W high — rotation-continuation confirmed), sentiment held +1 (VIX Day 6 constructive but F&G still stale). Macro held -1 (10Y 4.485 flat, DXY 100.93 essentially flat = slightly softened tilt vs Jul 6 firming). Cross-asset held 0 (Gold defensive-bid persistence stalls into flat +0.14%, Brent firms modestly, DXY flat). Geopolitical held +2.
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Bullish — VIX close below 15 for 2+ sessions (→ Stage 2):** **NOT FIRED but ARMED — record-tight 0.95 pts gap (from 1.33 pts Jul 6 → 0.95 pts Jul 7).** Closest all cycle. One 6% VIX crush session takes it. Trigger armed.
  - **Bullish — VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (→ Stage 2):** **NOT FIRED but ARMED — gap narrows meaningfully from 2.98 pts to 1.81 pts on Jul 7 -4.18% crush.** First real progress on VXN in the cycle. Trigger armed on continuation.
  - **Bullish — SPX/NDX new relative highs:** **PARTIALLY FIRED — Nasdaq Comp buffer restored to -3.9% (from -5.0%), NDX to -3.5% (from -4.7%), SPX to -1.1% (from -1.8%).** All three recover 1.1-1.2 pts of ground vs 52W high. Not full relative highs but decisive recovery. **DJI held effectively at 52W high (-0.0%).**
  - **Bullish — Broker confirms TQQQ reclaims 50DMA within Jul 3-6:** **ESTIMATED RECLAIMED (est. $76.33 vs 50DMA $76.39, ~-0.08% gap) — broker confirm still highest-priority open item.** If broker confirms Jul 6 close above $76.39, trigger FIRES. If Jul 6 close still below, trigger remains PARTIAL.
  - **Bearish — VIX re-crosses above 18:** **NOT FIRED — gap widens to 2.05 pts (from 1.67 pts Jul 6).** Trigger has moved further away on Jul 7 crush.
  - **Bearish — VIX re-crosses above 20:** **NOT FIRED — gap widens to 4.05 pts (from 3.67 pts Jul 6).**
  - **Bearish — VXN re-tests 30:** **NOT FIRED — gap widens to 3.19 pts (from 2.02 pts Jul 6).** Meaningful expansion of buffer.
  - **Bearish — TQQQ below 50DMA $76.39 + Nasdaq Comp -5% concurrent:** **CLEARED first leg (Nasdaq Comp -3.9%); second leg (TQQQ 50DMA) needs broker confirm.** Trigger's regime-transition signal is DE-FIRING. If broker confirms TQQQ reclaimed 50DMA, trigger fully clears.
  - **Bearish — MOU walk-back / geopolitical shock:** **NOT FIRED** (no incremental headlines).
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **NOT REFRESHED** (data gap, Week 5).
- **Notable lens flips:**
  1. **Dealer/sentiment upgrades +1 → +2.** VIX 15.95 Day 6 sub-18 record-tight to Stage-2-trigger + VXN -4.18% crush sub-27 = broad-market AND Nasdaq-concentration vol both in decisive recovery mode. First session of the cycle where VXN broke sub-27 = concentration-premium regime tick down.
  2. **Breadth upgrades -1 → 0.** Nasdaq Comp recovers 1.1 pts to -3.9% (buffer restored, trigger cleared first leg), NDX recovers 1.2 pts to -3.5%, DJI holds at 52W high with rotation-continuation confirmed. Not +1 because SPX/NDX still -1.1%/-3.5% below 52W highs = not relative highs; TQQQ 50DMA reclaim still needs broker confirm.
  3. **VIX/VXN spread narrows second consecutive session to 10.86 pts** (12.00 Jul 3 → 11.65 Jul 6 → 10.86 Jul 7) = Nasdaq-concentration premium mean-reversion signal CONFIRMED across two sessions. Signal reading from Jul 6 ("if Jul 7-8 spread continues to narrow → rotation-continuation base case strengthens") CONFIRMED on Jul 7. Base case Stage 3 sustain with rotation upgraded from 45% to 55%.
  4. **Cross-asset composition softens marginally.** Gold flat +0.14% (defensive bid pauses its record-approach), DXY essentially flat (mild-hawkish firming from Jul 6 stalls), Brent +1.06% (growth-easing narrative fully unwinds). Reading: risk-hedge demand still embedded but no longer accelerating; wait-and-see regime with dropping event-hedge intensity.
  5. **NFP Jul 3 + Jul 6-7 resolution: Base case #1 from Jul 6 read (in-line NFP + rotation continues + defensive bid persistent) has fully played out.** Rotation-continuation confirmed; defensive bid persisting but not accelerating.

> **Snapshot mix:** Equity indices + VXN = **Jul 6 Monday close** (Jul 3 half-day + Jul 6 full-day cumulative resolution now available). VIX + DXY + Brent + Gold = **Jul 7 Tuesday intraday**. 10Y unchanged from Jul 2 (data cadence gap).
>
> **Headline signal #1 — BEARISH BREADTH TRIGGER CLEARED first leg on Jul 6 close.** Nasdaq Comp recovers 1.1 pts from -5.0% to -3.9% = threshold cleared with meaningful buffer. NDX +1.26% and TQQQ estimated +3.78% cumulative Jul 3-Jul 6 = TQQQ ~$76.33 essentially at 50DMA $76.39. **Broker confirm on Jul 6 TQQQ close vs 50DMA remains highest-priority open item, but the estimated position has closed the -3.7% Jul 2 gap to essentially flat.** Rotation-continuation confirmed with DJI holding at 52W high.
>
> **Headline signal #2 — VXN sub-27 first close (-4.18% Jul 6) + VIX/VXN spread narrows second consecutive session to 10.86 pts.** First real Nasdaq-vol crush of the cycle. Concentration-premium mean-reversion signal from Jul 6 read ("if Jul 7-8 spread continues to narrow → rotation-continuation base case strengthens") CONFIRMED on Jul 7. **Reading: dealers appear to have completed their Nasdaq-hedge-adjustment cycle at Jul 2-3 peak; concentration premium now unwinding.**
>
> **Headline signal #3 — VIX 15.95 Day 6 sub-18 lock deepens; gap to Stage-2 trigger narrows to record-tight 0.95 pts.** New cycle low. One 6% VIX crush session takes it below 15 = Stage-2-approach activates. Bearish triggers all widen: VIX above 18 to 2.05 pts, VIX above 20 to 4.05 pts, VXN above 30 to 3.19 pts (all buffers expanded).
>
> **Headline signal #4 — Cross-asset defensive bid PAUSES.** Gold flat +0.14% (record-approach momentum stalls), DXY flat +0.08% (mild-hawkish firming from Jul 6 stalls), Brent +1.06% (growth-easing narrative fully unwinds). Reading: risk-hedge demand still embedded through CPI Jul 10 approach but no longer accelerating. Wait-and-see regime with dropping event-hedge intensity.
>
> **What's changed vs Jul 6:** Bearish breadth trigger first leg CLEARED (Nasdaq Comp -3.9%); TQQQ estimated reclaims 50DMA (broker confirm still open); VIX crushes to 15.95 Day 6 sub-18 lock (gap to Stage-2 tightens to record 0.95 pts); VXN -4.18% breaks sub-27 (gap to Stage-2 narrows to 1.81 pts); VIX/VXN spread narrows second session confirming Nasdaq-concentration mean-reversion; Gold record-approach momentum stalls; DXY firming stalls; Brent modestly firms. **Net: composition improves decisively across breadth + dealer/vol lenses; base case for Stage-3-sustain-with-rotation strengthens from 45% to 55%; Stage-2-approach probability adds meaningful weight. Total score +1 → +4 (+3 point upgrade).**

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 3 — Neutral/choppy (VIX 15-22, range-bound). SUSTAIN DAY 5 with STAGE-2-APPROACH ARMED.** VIX 15.95 sits inside Stage 3 range with record-tight 0.95 pts to Stage-2 trigger, 2.05 pts margin to 18 bearish, 4.05 pts to 20 bearish. VXN 26.81 with 1.81 pts to Stage-2 trigger and 3.19 pts margin to 30 bearish. **Bearish breadth trigger CLEARED first leg on Jul 6 (Nasdaq Comp -3.9%); second leg (TQQQ 50DMA) essentially reclaimed on estimate but needs broker confirm.** Stage 3 held (not yet upgraded to Stage 2) because: (a) VIX below 15 for 2+ sessions has NOT yet fired (needs one more crush session), (b) VXN below 25 for 2+ sessions has NOT yet fired (needs additional -1.81 pt move), (c) SPX/NDX not at relative highs, (d) broker confirm on TQQQ 50DMA reclaim still open, (e) CPI Jul 10 binding event within 5-day lookout. **Regime is armed for Stage-2 upgrade on continued VIX+VXN crush; CPI Jul 10 is the binding gate.**
- **Stage Anchor:** Jul 1, 2026 — VXN sub-28 FIRED, VIX Day 2 sub-18 locked, Nasdaq Comp buffer restored, quarter-end orderly. Stage 3 = Day 5 of sustain with breadth trigger first leg cleared, Stage-2-approach armed.
- **Position:** Stage 3 Day 5 into CPI Jul 10 binding event. Base case Stage 3 sustain with rotation: 55% (up from 45%); Stage 2 approach on VIX+VXN continuation crush + CPI in-line-to-cool: 20%; Stage 4 re-entry on CPI hot surprise + breadth-trigger-re-fires: 15% (down from 30%); extended Stage 3 churn on CPI mixed: 8%; Stage 5 tail: ~2%.
- **Confidence: Medium (upgraded from Low).** Why Medium: (a) **Bearish breadth trigger first leg cleared on Jul 6 close** = regime-transition signal DE-firing; (b) **VIX Day 6 sub-18 lock + VXN sub-27 first close + VIX/VXN spread second consecutive narrowing** = broad-market AND Nasdaq-concentration vol both in decisive recovery; (c) **NFP Jul 3 played out as market-friendly per Jul 6 confirmation**; (d) **DJI at 52W high + rotation continuation confirmed**; (e) **Structural cushion at 200DMA $68.09 restored on TQQQ estimated recovery**. Not High because: (1) **CPI Jul 10 binding event within 5-day lookout** = single-event regime-decider ahead; (2) **broker confirm on TQQQ 50DMA reclaim still open** = highest-priority verification pending; (3) **Positioning + F&G + HY OAS data gap Week 5**; (4) **Stage-2 triggers not yet fired** — one crush session away on VIX and 1.81 pts on VXN; (5) **Between two scores take lower per hard rules**.
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 2 mild-bullish/grind):** VIX daily close below 15 for 2+ sessions (currently 15.95, **0.95 pts away — record-tight all cycle**) AND VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (currently 26.81, 1.81 pts away — narrowed meaningfully from 2.98 pts Jul 6) AND SPX/NDX reclaim relative highs AND **broker confirms TQQQ Jul 6 close above 50DMA $76.39**. Timeframe: Jul 7-10 pre-CPI window.
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 4 re-entry):** **CPI Jul 10 hot surprise + VIX spike above 18-20** OR **Nasdaq Comp re-breaks -5% concurrent with broker confirms TQQQ below 50DMA sustained** OR VIX re-crosses above 18 (**2.05 pts away — widened from 1.67 pts on Jul 7 crush**) OR VIX above 20 (4.05 pts away — widened from 3.67 pts) OR VXN re-tests 30 (3.19 pts away — widened from 2.02 pts) OR MOU walk-back / geopolitical shock OR HY OAS through 300 bp on refresh.

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **strengthens to Stage 3 sustain Day 5 with Stage-2-approach ARMED and Medium confidence** — VIX 15.95 Day 6 sub-18 lock deepens to record-tight 0.95 pts of Stage-2 trigger, VXN -4.18% breaks sub-27 first close of cycle narrowing gap to 1.81 pts, VIX/VXN spread narrows second consecutive session to 10.86 pts confirming Nasdaq-concentration premium mean-reversion, bearish breadth trigger first leg CLEARED on Jul 6 close (Nasdaq Comp -3.9% from -5.0%), TQQQ estimated back to essentially 50DMA (broker confirm open), DJI at 52W high with rotation-continuation confirmed. Total score +1 → +4 (+3 point upgrade). **Broker confirm of TQQQ Jul 6 close vs 50DMA + CPI Jul 10 binding event are next binding gates; Stage-2 upgrade armed on continued VIX+VXN crush through CPI window.**

## Diverging Signals
- **THE DOMINANT JUL 7 TENSION: Stage-2-approach ARMED against CPI Jul 10 binding event.** VIX 15.95 Day 6 sub-18 record-tight 0.95 pts to Stage-2 + VXN sub-27 first close + breadth trigger cleared first leg + rotation-continuation confirmed = all bullish trigger conditions except SPX/NDX relative highs and broker confirm on TQQQ 50DMA are within one crush-session of firing. **But CPI Jul 10 sits inside the 5-day lookout as the single-event regime-decider.** If CPI prints in-line-to-cool + VIX/VXN continue crushing on Jul 8-9 = Stage-2 upgrade confirmed by Jul 10-14. If CPI hot surprise = Stage-4 re-entry activates on VIX spike above 18-20.
- **VIX/VXN spread narrows second consecutive session to 10.86 pts** (12.00 Jul 3 → 11.65 Jul 6 → 10.86 Jul 7) = Nasdaq-concentration premium mean-reversion signal CONFIRMED across two sessions. Jul 6 read's forecast ("if Jul 7-8 spread continues to narrow → rotation-continuation base case strengthens") DELIVERED. **Reading: dealers appear to have completed their Nasdaq-hedge-adjustment cycle around Jul 2-3 peak; concentration premium now unwinding decisively.**
- **Cross-asset defensive bid PAUSES vs Jul 6 persistence.** Gold flat +0.14% (record-approach momentum stalls), DXY flat (mild-hawkish firming stalls), Brent modestly firms (growth-easing narrative fully unwinds). Reading: risk-hedge demand still embedded through CPI Jul 10 approach but no longer accelerating. Wait-and-see regime with dropping event-hedge intensity. **Not defensive-bid-collapse (Gold still at $4,161 = near record); but momentum has stalled = participants are done adding hedges but not yet unwinding.**
- **All bearish trigger buffers widened simultaneously vs Jul 6.** VIX above 18 gap 1.67 → 2.05 pts (+0.38); VIX above 20 gap 3.67 → 4.05 pts (+0.38); VXN above 30 gap 2.02 → 3.19 pts (+1.17). First session where all bearish trigger buffers expanded together = broad-based bearish-signal de-firing. Momentum flipped decisively from "toward bearish" (Jul 6) to "away from bearish" (Jul 7).
- **Broker confirm on TQQQ 50DMA remains highest-priority open item.** Estimated $76.33 vs 50DMA $76.39 = -0.08% gap (essentially at threshold). Broker confirm above/at $76.39 = bullish trigger sub-condition FIRES; broker confirm below = bullish trigger sub-condition PARTIAL. On the constructive backdrop confirmed by Nasdaq Comp recovery + VXN crush, the estimated position is at the flip-point of the last remaining structural gate.
- **Positioning + F&G + HY OAS data gap Week 5.** F&G stale Jun 17 = 3 weeks stale. NAAIM/COT/AAII gap continues. HY OAS not refreshed. CPI Jul 10 will inevitably refresh macro read. If credit quietly widened over the gap (unretrieved), cross-asset score could shift materially on refresh.

## TQQQ Read
- **Momentum:** RSI estimated ~52-55 — rebounded above midline neutral on Jul 3-Jul 6 cumulative est. +3.78% recovery. Jul 7 intraday not in snapshot = cannot refresh. Neutral-to-mildly-bullish momentum backdrop; oversold conditions from Jul 2 fully unwound. Mean-reversion tailwind that was building on Jul 6 = spent.
- **Market structure:** **SIDEWAYS held, buffer to DOWNTURN threshold restored.** -13.4% from 4-wk high $88.09 (vs -16.5% Jul 6); +12.1% above 4-wk low $68.08 (vs +8.0% Jul 6). Downturn threshold $70.47 sits 7.7% below spot (vs 4.2% Jul 6). Not RALLY (would need +30% above 4-wk low = requires $88.51 = above 4-wk high). **SIDEWAYS-with-restored-cushion; Stage-2-approach conditions armed but not RALLY structure.**
- **Trend:** **Price estimated ESSENTIALLY AT 50DMA $76.39 (~-0.08% gap; broker confirm required).** 200DMA cushion restored to +12.1% (from +8.0% Jul 6). **50DMA gate flip-point reached on estimate; broker confirm will decide whether the sub-condition fires or partial-fires the Stage-2 bullish trigger.**
